title: TC001-Start Pricing Audit journey from Landing Page
description: Verifies that selecting Optimise Existing Product loads the mind map in Audit mode and shows the selling-status root question.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:5173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:5173", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Optimise Existing Product').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('xpath=//div[@data-testid="mind-map"]').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Audit').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=confirm').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=selling').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC006-Initial mind map loads with root journey classification node visible
description: Verifies the main mind map view renders and the initial nodes are visible on first load.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:5173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:5173", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('xpath=//*[@aria-label="Mind map canvas" or @data-testid="mind-map-canvas" or contains(@class, "mind-map-canvas") or normalize-space(text())="Mind map canvas"]').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Pricing Audit').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Pricing Strategy').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('xpath=//*[@aria-label="Root journey classification node" or @data-testid="root-journey-classification-node" or contains(@class, "root-journey-classification-node") or normalize-space(text())="Root journey classification node"]').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

        frame = context.pages[-1]

        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/footer/div[1]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Expand' chevron to reveal journey nodes, then open the 'Optimise Existing Product' arrow so the Product Classification node becomes available.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/footer/div[1]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div[3]/div[1]/div[2]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Expand' chevron to reveal the journey nodes so the path card arrows become available (use fresh index from current page).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/footer/div[1]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Expand' chevron to reveal journey nodes, then open the 'Optimise Existing Product' card (click its arrow) so the Product Classification node becomes available.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/footer/div[1]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div[3]/div[1]/div[2]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Final assertions appended to the test script
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Verify we are on the root path
        assert "/" in frame.url
        # Verify the journey expand chevron (chevron_right) is present and visible
        chevron = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/footer/div[1]/span')
        assert await chevron.count() > 0
        assert await chevron.is_visible()
        # Check whether a 'Product Classification' node exists among known candidate nodes on the page
        candidates = [
            'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div/div/div/div[1]/div/div/div[2]/div[1]/div/div[4]',
            'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div/div/div/div[1]/div/div/div[2]/div[1]/div/div[5]',
            'xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/div/div/div/div[1]/div/div/div[2]/div[3]'
        ]
        found_product_classification = False
        for xp in candidates:
            el = frame.locator(f"{xp}")
            if await el.count() == 0:
                continue
            try:
                txt = (await el.inner_text()).strip()
            except Exception:
                txt = ""
            if 'Product Classification' in txt:
                found_product_classification = True
                break
        # If the required node or downstream controls (e.g. Unit cost input) do not exist, report and stop the test as per the test plan
        if not found_product_classification:
            raise AssertionError("Required node 'Product Classification' not found on page; cannot continue with deep dive or unit cost input. Marking task as done.")
        # Note: The page does not expose a 'Unit cost' input or the '12.50' value in the available elements list, so the test cannot proceed further.
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/footer/div[1]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Optimise Existing Product' card's arrow to enter the journey on the current page (use element index 539). Then re-evaluate the page for the 'Expand' control and proceed.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/main/div[3]/div[1]/div[2]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Audit Existing Price' chevron/arrow to enter the journey (use element index 569).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[1]/div/footer/div[1]/span').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=9.99').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=9.99').first).to_be_hidden(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:

            await context.close()
        if browser:

title: TC013-Toggle theme from light to dark and back to light
description: Verifies the header theme toggle switches the visible UI between light and dark modes and can be toggled back.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:5173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:5173", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('xpath=//button[@aria-label="Toggle theme"]').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Dark mode').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Light mode').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST FAILURE

ASSERTIONS:
- Header theme toggle button not found on the page.
- No interactive elements present on the page; the UI appears blank.
- Single-page application content did not render at http://localhost:5173, preventing verification of the theme switch.

from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():

        page = await context.new_page()

        await page.goto("http://localhost:5173", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Click the Theme toggle button (index 58). Repeat total of 3 clicks, then check that the text 'Dark mode' is visible.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/header/div[2]/button[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/header/div[2]/button[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/header/div[2]/button[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the Theme toggle button 3 times (two immediate clicks, wait 1s, then one final click) and verify the text 'Dark mode' is visible. Then finish the task.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/header/div[2]/button[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/header/div[2]/button[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the Theme toggle button 3 times (two immediate clicks, wait 1 second, then one final click) and then verify that the text 'Dark mode' is visible on the page.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/header/div[2]/button[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the Theme toggle button once more (index 360), wait 1s, then check whether the text 'Dark mode' is visible. If visible, finish the task.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/header/div[2]/button[1]').nth(0)
